--branch

--all

--verbose

options.name: -C

--signoff
options.description: Add Signed-off-by trailer

options.description: Allow recording an empty commit

options.name: --allow-empty-message

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show what would be committed without committing

options.name: --no-color

options.description: Ignore all whitespace changes

options.name: -b

--verbose

--patch

--message

--verbose
